text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the paddock before the Hyacinth Stakes,
Agnes Digital is watching the other Umamusume
intensely.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
choice_data_list: All right, keep your cleats on.
All right, keep your cleats on.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine today! I mean, I'm always fine! I wouldn't
let myself lose control.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But do you feel it, Trainer? Something's weird
today.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume are as darling as ever... Wait.
Maybe that's it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Their presence is... even more radiant than ever
today...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Look at how serious everyone is before the race.
It's to die for. Although I get the feeling I
shouldn't put it like that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's like... beneath their grace lies something even
more pure...
choice_data_list: Something... you're hoping to feel firsthand?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Nononononono! Don't be ridiculous! I would
never be so presumptuous.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
No. Today, I only wish to behold it—the true
essence of Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I won't get involved, of course. A responsible
simp admires quietly and without touching!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
However... I can admire them from a better angle
than before—from as close as I can get.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As always, she talks as if she's just here to
spectate the race. But I can tell by her eyes that
she's taking this a little more seriously than usual.
